# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "2.1"

# Global plugin configuration for CORS
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      enable: true
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization

# Service-level plugin configuration for authentication
services:
  - name: my-service
    url: http://my-backend-service
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - api_key
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/*
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 1000
              hour: 10000

# Route-level plugin configuration for CORS and rate limiting
routes:
  - hosts:
      - example.com
    paths:
      - /api/*
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          enable: true
          origins:
            - "https://example-client.com"
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 5000
